items.title: Study the pattern
items.body:
Workbook lesson 17: To read / To write. Read the sentences, listen, and repeat.

Examples:
• I read I write
• I read the newspaper I write many e-mails
• I read the e-mail I write e-mails to my boyfrie nd
• I read a magazine I write to my girlfriend

items.text: I read the newspaper I write many e-mails

items.prompt: Eu leio o jornal Eu escreve muitos e-mails
options: You read the newspaper I write many e-mails
I read the newspaper I write many e-mails 3.

e-mails many write I newspaper the read I

items.answer: I read a magazine I write to my girlfriend
I read to my children I write an e-mail to my bo ss
